name: 20 mm 1x1x1x1
description:
You find a wild 1x1x1x1 measuring 20 mm, approaching you curiously

Okay, don't take this too seriously.

I made this bot completely inspired by something I do in VRChat. I always like to use a 1x1x1x1 avatar that I like and I change my size to measure 20 mm. I seriously love seeing people's reactions when they see me, and even more so when they pet my head. 😭

I don't play VRchat that often, but when I do, I always use the same 1x1x1x1 avatar and set my character size to 20mm. I play very infrequently, and sadly, I don't have VR, so... :(

Honestly, playing VRchat makes me wish I had VR, but sadly, I don't have the money to buy something like that, and I have no idea if you need anything more than just buying VR glasses.

Have a good day ^w^
creator: The snow moth
